items.name: use-brand-colors
items.description: Reads the active brand's chart palette from CSS variables, synchronously (no flash).

items.name: hello-chart
items.description: A tiny animated visx bar chart that reads the active brand palette — the registry's hello world.

items.name: bar-chart
items.description: Vertical bar chart with axes, gridlines, value labels and a staggered spring rise-in.

items.name: horizontal-bar-chart
items.description: Horizontal ranking bars with category + value labels and a grow-in animation.

items.name: stacked-bar-chart
items.description: Stacked bars across categories (BarStack) with a legend, axes and rise-in.

items.name: grouped-bar-chart
items.description: Side-by-side grouped bars (BarGroup) with a legend, axes and rise-in.

items.name: line-chart
items.description: Multi-series smooth line chart with axes, gridlines and a left-to-right draw-in.

items.name: area-chart
items.description: Gradient area + line with axes and a clip-path reveal.

items.name: sparkline
items.description: A tiny inline area+line sparkline (no axes) — takes data: number[] and a unique id.

items.name: donut-chart
items.description: Animated donut (Pie) with a legend and a centered total.

items.name: scatter-plot
items.description: Scatter plot on linear scales with brand-styled axes and gridlines.

items.name: heatmap
items.description: Rectangular heatmap (HeatmapRect) with value-scaled opacity from the brand palette.

items.name: treemap
items.description: Squarified treemap of hierarchical data, colored from the brand palette.

items.name: radar-chart
items.description: Radar/spider chart with concentric grid and 1–2 filled series.

items.name: radial-bar-chart
items.description: Bars arranged around a circle (Arc + scaleRadial), sweeping in.

items.name: legend
items.description: Brand-styled ordinal legend (@visx/legend) for placing beside a chart.
